---
description: "Review task specifications for quality, FRD coverage, threat coverage, and FRD §8 release criteria. Use after tasks are planned and before implementation begins."
agent: lead
---

Review the task plan for feature **${input:feature}** under `specs/tasks/` using `/plan-review-skill`. The feature argument may be the FRD number (e.g., `F001`), the FRD filename (e.g., `001-user-authentication`), or blank to review all features with pending tasks.
